---
title: "Part Color Theme Test"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: book
    keep-tex: true
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{etoolbox}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{colortbl}
        \usepackage{mdframed}

        % Part accent colors
        \colorlet{partI}  {blue}
        \colorlet{partII} {teal}
        \definecolor{partIII}{HTML}{267342}
        \colorlet{partIV} {orange}

        % Active part color + tints (default to Part I)
        \colorlet{partcol}  {partI}
        \colorlet{partcol80}{partcol!80}
        \colorlet{partcol50}{partcol!50}
        \colorlet{partcol20}{partcol!20}

        % Switch partcol at each \part
        \newcounter{partnum}
        \pretocmd{\part}{%
          \stepcounter{partnum}%
          \ifcase\value{partnum}
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partI}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partII}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partIII}%
            \or \colorlet{partcol}{partIV}%
          \fi
          \colorlet{partcol80}{partcol!80}%
          \colorlet{partcol50}{partcol!50}%
          \colorlet{partcol20}{partcol!20}%
        }{}{}

        % Section headings in partcol (mirrors krantz SectionHeadFont)
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}  {\color{partcol}\large\bfseries\sffamily}{}{0em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\color{partcol}\normalsize\bfseries\sffamily}{}{0em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsubsection}{\color{partcol}\normalsize\itshape\sffamily}{}{0em}{}

        % Colored rule helper
        \newcommand{\partrule}{%
          \textcolor{partcol}{\rule{\linewidth}{0.8pt}}}

        % "Key Point" box using mdframed
        \mdfdefinestyle{keypointbox}{%
          linecolor=partcol,
          linewidth=1.5pt,
          backgroundcolor=partcol20,
          innertopmargin=6pt,
          innerbottommargin=6pt,
          innerleftmargin=8pt,
          innerrightmargin=8pt,
          skipabove=8pt,
          skipbelow=4pt}
        \newenvironment{keypoint}{%
          \begin{mdframed}[style=keypointbox]%
          \textcolor{partcol}{\textbf{Key Point:}}\space
        }{\end{mdframed}}
---

## Color swatches

\medskip
\colorbox{partI!20}{\textcolor{partI}{\textbf{Part I — blue}}}
\colorbox{partII!20}{\textcolor{partII}{\textbf{Part II — teal}}}
\colorbox{partIII!20}{\textcolor{partIII}{\textbf{Part III — green}}}
\colorbox{partIV!20}{\textcolor{partIV}{\textbf{Part IV — orange}}}

\part{Part I — Orienting Ideas}

# Chapter 1 heading (not colored by titlesec — chapter level)

## Section heading (partcol)

### Subsection heading (partcol)

#### Subsubsection heading (partcol)

**Colored rule** separating content areas:

\partrule

**Highlighted inline text** using tints:
\colorbox{partcol20}{20\% tint background},
\textcolor{partcol}{\textbf{full color text}},
\colorbox{partcol50}{50\% tint background}.

**Key Point box:**

\begin{keypoint}
This is a key insight from the chapter. The border and background
use the current part color. The label "Key Point" is in full part color.
\end{keypoint}

**Colored table header row:**

\medskip
\begin{tabular}{>{\columncolor{partcol20}}l r r}
\toprule
\rowcolor{partcol}
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Method}} &
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Value 1}} &
\textcolor{white}{\textbf{Value 2}} \\
\midrule
Row one   & 1.23 & 4.56 \\
Row two   & 7.89 & 0.12 \\
Row three & 3.45 & 6.78 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}

\part{Part II — Exploratory Methods}

## Section heading should now be teal

\partrule

\begin{keypoint}
The box border, background, label, rule, and heading are all teal now —
driven by the single \texttt{partcol} switch.
\end{keypoint}

\part{Part III — Univariate Linear Models}

## Section heading should be green

\partrule

\begin{keypoint}
Green key point box.
\end{keypoint}

\part{Part IV — Multivariate Linear Models}

## Section heading should be orange

\partrule

\begin{keypoint}
Orange key point box.
\end{keypoint}
